Highcharts — Non-Commercial License
=====================================

The vendored Highcharts files in this directory are redistributed under
Highcharts' Non-Commercial License. Free for personal, school, and
non-profit use. Commercial use requires a paid license from Highsoft AS.

Upstream: https://www.highcharts.com/license
Version:  12 (fetched from https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highcharts@12/)

If you intend to ship `session-metrics` as part of a commercial product,
or redistribute reports generated with the Highcharts renderer within a
commercial offering, either (a) obtain a Highcharts commercial license,
or (b) pass `--chart-lib none` (or switch to an MIT-licensed renderer
once we add uPlot / Chart.js vendoring) so no Highcharts code is emitted.

For personal, educational, or non-commercial internal tooling use:
this is the default licensing and you do not need any additional
permission from Highsoft AS.

None of the above is legal advice; consult the upstream license if you
are unsure whether your use case qualifies.
